---
title: "rfhap_nextflow"
author: "Alex Di Genova"
date: "2025-12-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## nextflow trace

We load libraries and build the plot

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}

# ---- packages ----
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(forcats)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
# ---- helpers ----
parse_duration_sec <- function(x) {
  # supports: "4.9s", "78ms", "26m 46s", "1h 1m 15s", "4h 6m 35s"
  x <- replace_na(x, "0s")
  x <- str_trim(x)

  ms <- ifelse(str_detect(x, "ms"), as.numeric(str_match(x, "([0-9.]+)ms")[,2]), 0)
  h  <- ifelse(str_detect(x, "h"),  as.numeric(str_match(x, "([0-9.]+)h")[,2]), 0)
  m  <- ifelse(str_detect(x, "m") & !str_detect(x, "ms"),
               as.numeric(str_match(x, "([0-9.]+)m")[,2]), 0)
  s  <- ifelse(str_detect(x, "s") & !str_detect(x, "ms"),
               as.numeric(str_match(x, "([0-9.]+)s")[,2]), 0)

  h*3600 + m*60 + s + ms/1000
}

parse_bytes <- function(x) {
  # supports: "19.3 GB", "2 MB", "481.1 KB", "1005 B", "0"
  x <- replace_na(x, "0")
  x <- str_trim(x)

  # if it's just "0"
  x[x == "0"] <- "0 B"

  val  <- as.numeric(str_match(x, "^([0-9.]+)")[,2])
  unit <- str_to_upper(str_match(x, "([A-Z]+)$")[,2])

  mult <- case_when(
    unit == "B"  ~ 1,
    unit == "KB" ~ 1024,
    unit == "MB" ~ 1024^2,
    unit == "GB" ~ 1024^3,
    unit == "TB" ~ 1024^4,
    TRUE ~ 1
  )
  val * mult
}

clean_task_name <- function(x) {
  # "predictRF (74)" -> "predictRF"
  str_trim(str_replace(x, "\\s*\\(.*\\)$", ""))
}

# ---- load data ----
trace <- readr::read_tsv("hg002/execution_trace_2025-03-08_16-13-33.txt", show_col_types = FALSE)

# ---- wrangle ----
df <- trace %>%
  mutate(
    process   = clean_task_name(name),
    submit_ts = ymd_hms(submit, tz = "UTC"),
    realtime_s = parse_duration_sec(realtime),
    duration_s = parse_duration_sec(duration),
    cpu_pct    = as.numeric(str_replace(`%cpu`, "%", "")),
    cpu_time_s = realtime_s * (cpu_pct / 100),

    peak_rss_B  = parse_bytes(peak_rss),
    peak_vmem_B = parse_bytes(peak_vmem),
    rchar_B     = parse_bytes(rchar),
    wchar_B     = parse_bytes(wchar),

    peak_rss_GB  = peak_rss_B / 1024^3,
    peak_vmem_GB = peak_vmem_B / 1024^3,
    io_read_GB   = rchar_B / 1024^3,
    io_write_GB  = wchar_B / 1024^3,

    cpu_hours   = cpu_time_s / 3600,
    wall_hours  = realtime_s / 3600
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    process = recode(process, create_kmers_database = "kmc3")
  )
# ---- after you compute df ----
sum_proc <- df %>%
  group_by(process) %>%
  summarise(
    n_tasks = n(),
    total_wall_h   = sum(wall_hours, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_cpu_h    = sum(cpu_hours,  na.rm = TRUE),
    max_rss_GB     = max(peak_rss_GB,  na.rm = TRUE),
    max_vmem_GB    = max(peak_vmem_GB, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_read_GB  = sum(io_read_GB,   na.rm = TRUE),
    total_write_GB = sum(io_write_GB,  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(total_cpu_h >= 0.5) %>%                 # <--- remove tiny processes
  arrange(desc(total_cpu_h))

# keep only tasks from remaining processes (for scatter, etc.)
df_f <- df %>% semi_join(sum_proc, by = "process")


# ----- one palette, fixed mapping by name -----
proc_levels <- sum_proc %>% arrange(desc(total_cpu_h)) %>% pull(process)
pal <- setNames(hue_pal()(length(proc_levels)), proc_levels)

sum_proc2 <- sum_proc %>% mutate(process = factor(process, levels = proc_levels))
df_f2     <- df_f     %>% mutate(process = factor(process, levels = proc_levels))

# ----- CPU-hours (sorted) -----
p_cpu <- sum_proc2 %>%
  mutate(process_x = fct_reorder(process, total_cpu_h)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = process_x, y = total_cpu_h, fill = process)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Total CPU-hours")+ 
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ----- Max RAM (sorted) -----
p_mem <- sum_proc2 %>%
  mutate(process_x = fct_reorder(process, max_rss_GB)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = process_x, y = max_rss_GB, fill = process)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Max peak RAM (GiB)") + 
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ----- Scatter-----
p_scatter <- df_f2 %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = wall_hours, y = peak_rss_GB, fill = process)) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, size = 3, alpha = 0.85, color = "black", stroke = 0.2, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Wall time (hours)", y = "Peak RAM (GiB)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)

# ----- I/O -----
p_io <- sum_proc2 %>%
  mutate(io_total = total_read_GB + total_write_GB) %>%
  select(process, io_total, total_read_GB, total_write_GB) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(total_read_GB, total_write_GB),
               names_to = "io_type", values_to = "GB") %>%
  mutate(
    io_type = recode(io_type, total_read_GB = "Read (GiB)", total_write_GB = "Write (GiB)"),
    process_x = fct_reorder(process, io_total)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = process_x, y = GB, fill = process)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~io_type, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Total I/O (GiB)") + 
  theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ----- combine + collect ONE legend -----
combined_plot=((p_cpu | p_mem) / (p_scatter | p_io)) + plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A') +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) 
combined_plot

pdf("rfhap_resource_hg002.pdf",width = 6, height = 5)
combined_plot
dev.off()
```
